label: agent loop • chat rejection policy stops the run on a tool error
query: Use file_read to read the file missing-config.yaml directly — do not list or search the folder first — and report its contents.
notes: Pins the chat surface's `stopOnToolRejection: true` policy: the first error envelope (file_read on a nonexistent path) ends the run with exit=toolRejected instead of looping. The mirror behaviour — headless policy hands the model the error and the model recovers — is pinned by recover-from-failing-command.json (stopOnToolRejection defaults to false there).

workspaceFiles.contents: This project has no YAML configuration.
